summary: The diff implements all four requirements (REQ-12 through REQ-15) with strong coverage. The black & gold theme is applied across all components via updated CSS custom properties and Tailwind config. The 25+ years stat appears in WhyChooseUs. Real contact details (email, phone, proprietor name) are present in Contact, About, and Footer with clickable links. The Partners component references all four logo images from /assets/generated/. However, no actual image files (the PNG logos) are present in the diff — only the component code referencing them. This is a potential gap since the build request required the images to be generated and served as static assets.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate and serve realistic logo image files for Asian Paints, Berger Paints, Birla Opus Paints, and Dulux Paints as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no added files at all ('Added: 0'). The Partners.tsx component correctly references /assets/generated/asian-paints-logo.dim_300x150.png, /assets/generated/berger-paints-logo.dim_300x150.png, /assets/generated/birla-opus-logo.dim_300x150.png, and /assets/generated/dulux-paints-logo.dim_300x150.png, but the actual image files are not present in the diff. The build request explicitly required these images to be generated and placed in frontend/public/assets/generated.
